pr.title: GatedAttn + ValueResidual + Full QAT + lzma-9 + BigramHash(2048)

output.summary: Lean GPTQLite: disable gated attention/value residual, drop SWA, and late-enable QAT so 2048-context training maximizes steps before legal TTT.
techniques: Disable gated attention/value residual to recover per-step budget
Omit SWA and trigger QAT only in final warmdown for stable TTT
Use 2048-context training to extend warmdown and accommodate longer evaluations
